name: chrx/rental-manager
description: Chrx Rental Manager — a self-contained WordPress plugin for property management companies to track properties, units, tenants, leases, payments, and a tenant self-service portal.

notes: PDF library (for receipts/statements, added in the Payments & Receipts phase): not yet required.
Candidate: dompdf/dompdf (pure-PHP, no external binary dependency, easiest zero-build-step install for shared hosting). Decision + composer require happens in that phase, documented there.
